name: 5p13_2_NIPBL_region
description: 5p13.2 NIPBL region — cohesin-loader gene mutated in Cornelia de Lange syndrome (CdLS). Recurrent ~3.7 Mb microduplication of 5p13.2 with NIPBL overexpression also causes a distinct dup(5p13) phenotype. Flanking short SDs (~98% identity) drive the recurrent rearrangement.

architecture.internal_structure: Two flanking SD blocks of ~50-100 kb at >97% identity bracketing NIPBL, C5orf42, RANBP3L; reciprocal del/dup phenotypes; short intragenic duplicons within NIPBL introns.
